subject: Ops note: persian deployment schedule for South Europe | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-9181
body: Following yesterday's call, the persian effort in South Europe needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Frida Kahlo seems to disagree with Nikola Tesla on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-9181. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: handoff, drop-bears.
